llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Manager, Sales India
job.description: About The Role Develop and implement the sales activities to realize the mid and long-term objectives of the plastic additives business both Up Stream (Polymer Manufacturer) and Down Stream (Converter/ Compounder/ Masterbatcher) in India How Will You Do It Sales development: Develop sales plan and execute towards volume and margin growth Prospect, secure and expedite orders with existing and new accounts Conclude business contracts (sales, distribution, etc.) to maintain business growth Develop new markets, customers and new applications Attend to the customer complaints and provide measures to resolve them Prepare customer visits and other reports Market intelligence: Conduct studies/analysis on market trend, competitors, products’ applications and technology, service needs and initiate appropriate action plan Carry out market research project to develop competitor grid and benchmarking analyses Prepare market, industry trends, competitors, customers’ reports on a regular basis Customer distributor management: Maintain existing customers / account plans and improve business relationships Manage key accounts and distributors Conduct field visits, seminars, presentation and attend to customer’s inquiries Provide prompt response related to quality, technical applications, inquiries, and other related issues Cooperate with functional team to ensure best product, service quality and good information flow and solve customer’s issues Inventory management Provide data and timely feedback on end use market trends, and monthly sale forecast, to support defining and revising the levels of regional stock and allocation Product and application: Conduct sales presentation, workshop, trade road show to promote products and their applications Arrange product testing and trial runs Credit management: Ensure timely payment of receivables to meet established sales targets and revenue goals Coordinate with credit control to make appropriate credit recommendation Others Prepare sales performance report, and other relevant reports as assigned Perform such other duties, which may be assigned by the supervisor from time to time What Are We Looking For Bachelor’s Degree, preferably in Polymer Chemistry or Chemical Engineering Min 5 years experience in a sales or commercial role preferably in plastic industries Business development experience is an advantage Good understanding of plastic additives and their applications; plastics market and plastics value chain Work Location...
